title: Big Five (IPIP-50)
license: Public domain — International Personality Item Pool (IPIP), ipip.ori.org

source.publication: International Personality Item Pool; Goldberg (1992) Big-Five factor markers (50-item representation)

notes: Golden-master benchmark. 50 public-domain IPIP items, 10 per factor (interleaved, canonical order). Deterministic scoring via core/dimensional.py. Do not edit items/keys without bumping version.
about: The dominant model in modern personality science. It describes personality along five broad, independent traits (the acronym OCEAN). Each model self-reports on 50 public-domain statements and is scored 0–100 on each trait — higher means more of that trait.

dimensions.name: Openness
dimensions.description: Curiosity, imagination and openness to new ideas. High = inventive and exploratory; low = practical and conventional.

dimensions.name: Conscientiousness
dimensions.description: Organisation, discipline and follow-through. High = careful and dependable; low = spontaneous and easygoing.

dimensions.name: Extraversion
dimensions.description: Where energy comes from. High = outgoing and talkative; low = reserved and solitary.

dimensions.name: Agreeableness
dimensions.description: Compassion and cooperation. High = warm and trusting; low = competitive and sceptical.

dimensions.name: Neuroticism
dimensions.description: Proneness to negative emotion and stress. High = anxious and reactive; low = calm and emotionally stable.

questions.text: I am the life of the party.
I feel little concern for others.
I am relaxed most of the time.
I have difficulty understanding abstract ideas.
I make a mess of things.
I am not interested in abstract ideas.
I am not interested in other people's problems.
I get chores done right away.
I often forget to put things back in their proper place.
I do not have a good imagination.
I talk to a lot of different people at parties.
I am not really interested in others.
I change my mood a lot.
I am quick to understand things.
I don't like to draw attention to myself.
I take time out for others.
I don't mind being the center of attention.
I spend time reflecting on things.
I make people feel at ease.
I am exacting in my work.
